suite.name: US-SeConnecterAuChat

kw.name: When L'utilisateur lance le client chat
Start Application
kw.doc: Starts the process in the ``command`` parameter on the host operating system. The given ``alias`` is stored to identify the started application in RemoteSwingLibrary.

kw.name: Set Jemmy Timeouts
kw.doc: Sets all relevant jemmy timeouts. By default they are all set to 5 seconds.

kw.name: Switch To Application
kw.doc: Switches between applications that are known to RemoteSwingLibrary. The application is identified using the ``alias``. Subsequent keywords will be passed on to this application.

kw.name: Then Seule la vue connexion est affichée
Window Should Be Open
kw.doc: Fails if the window is not open.

kw.name: Window Should Not Be Open
kw.doc: Fails if the window is open. | `Window Should Not Be Open` | window |

kw.name: Select Window
kw.doc: Selects a window as current context and sets focus to it.

kw.name: Component Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Checks that component is visible. *N.B.* Regular expression can be used to select the dialog by prefixing the identifier with ``regexp=``. See more details in `[#Regular expressions|Regular expressions]` section.

kw.name: Component Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Checks that component is visible. *N.B.* Regular expression can be used to select the dialog by prefixing the identifier with ``regexp=``. See more details in `[#Regular expressions|Regular expressions]` section.

kw.name: Component Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Checks that component is visible. *N.B.* Regular expression can be used to select the dialog by prefixing the identifier with ``regexp=``. See more details in `[#Regular expressions|Regular expressions]` section.

kw.name: Component Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Checks that component is visible. *N.B.* Regular expression can be used to select the dialog by prefixing the identifier with ``regexp=``. See more details in `[#Regular expressions|Regular expressions]` section.

kw.name: Get Text Field Value
kw.doc: Returns the value of a text component (e.g. text field, password field, text area).

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Get Text Field Value
kw.doc: Returns the value of a text component (e.g. text field, password field, text area).

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.

kw.name: Get Text Field Value
kw.msg: ${texte_attendu} = Saisir l'adresse et le port du serveur chat.
kw.doc: Returns the value of a text component (e.g. text field, password field, text area).

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Switch To Application
kw.doc: Switches between applications that are known to RemoteSwingLibrary. The application is identified using the ``alias``. Subsequent keywords will be passed on to this application.

kw.name: System Exit
kw.doc: Uses the RemoteSwingLibrary java agent to call system exit for the current java application.

kw.name: Given Le serveur chat est accessible @${IP_DEFAUT}:${PORT_DEFAUT}
Start Process
kw.doc: Starts a new process on background.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Process Should Be Running
kw.arg: Le serveur Camix n'est pas accessible.
kw.doc: Verifies that the process is running.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: TODO: assurer que le serveur Camix est accessible @127.0.0.1:12345
kw.arg: TODO: assurer que le serveur Camix est accessible @${ip}:${port}
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: And Plusieurs ${autres utilisateurs} sont connectés au chat (@${IP_DEFAUT}:${PORT_DEFAUT}, canal par défaut)
kw.source_name: Plusieurs ${utilisateurs} sont connectés au chat (@${ip}:${port}, canal par défaut)

kw.name: Given L'${utilisateur} est connecté au chat (@${ip}:${port}, canal par défaut)
kw.source_name: L'${utilisateur} est connecté au chat (@${ip}:${port}, canal par défaut)

kw.name: And L'utilisateur lance le client chat
Start Application
kw.doc: Starts the process in the ``command`` parameter on the host operating system. The given ``alias`` is stored to identify the started application in RemoteSwingLibrary.

kw.name: Set Jemmy Timeouts
kw.doc: Sets all relevant jemmy timeouts. By default they are all set to 5 seconds.

kw.name: Switch To Application
kw.doc: Switches between applications that are known to RemoteSwingLibrary. The application is identified using the ``alias``. Subsequent keywords will be passed on to this application.

kw.name: Switch To Application
kw.doc: Switches between applications that are known to RemoteSwingLibrary. The application is identified using the ``alias``. Subsequent keywords will be passed on to this application.

kw.name: Select Window
kw.doc: Selects a window as current context and sets focus to it.

kw.name: Focus To Component
kw.doc: Sets focus to the component. Useful for example when sending keyboard events to a component.

kw.name: Clear Text Field
kw.doc: Clears contents of text component (e.g. text field, password field, text area).

kw.name: Type Into Text Field
kw.doc: Types text into a text component (e.g. text field, password field, text area). Same as `Insert Into Textfield` but sends real key events when setting text field contents. Useful if application expects real keyboard events instead of only setting the text of the textfield.

kw.name: And L'utilisateur modifie le numéro du ${PORT_DEFAUT}
Switch To Application
kw.doc: Switches between applications that are known to RemoteSwingLibrary. The application is identified using the ``alias``. Subsequent keywords will be passed on to this application.

kw.name: Select Window
kw.doc: Selects a window as current context and sets focus to it.

kw.name: Focus To Component
kw.doc: Sets focus to the component. Useful for example when sending keyboard events to a component.

kw.name: Clear Text Field
kw.doc: Clears contents of text component (e.g. text field, password field, text area).

kw.name: Type Into Text Field
kw.doc: Types text into a text component (e.g. text field, password field, text area). Same as `Insert Into Textfield` but sends real key events when setting text field contents. Useful if application expects real keyboard events instead of only setting the text of the textfield.

kw.name: And L'utilisateur demande à se connecter
Switch To Application
kw.doc: Switches between applications that are known to RemoteSwingLibrary. The application is identified using the ``alias``. Subsequent keywords will be passed on to this application.

kw.name: Select Window
kw.doc: Selects a window as current context and sets focus to it.

kw.name: Click On Component
kw.doc: Clicks on a component, optionally using click count, a specific mouse button and keyboard modifiers.

kw.name: Then Un message informe l'utilisateur qu'une connexion est initiée à l'adresse ${IP_DEFAUT} et au ${PORT_DEFAUT} mentionnés
kw.source_name: Un message informe l'${utilisateur} qu'une connexion est initiée à l'adresse ${ip} et au ${port} mentionnés

kw.name: Convert To Integer
kw.doc: Converts the given item to an integer number.

kw.name: Format String
kw.doc: Formats a ``template`` using the given ``positional`` and ``named`` arguments.

kw.name: Switch To Application
kw.doc: Switches between applications that are known to RemoteSwingLibrary. The application is identified using the ``alias``. Subsequent keywords will be passed on to this application.

kw.name: Select Window
kw.doc: Selects a window as current context and sets focus to it.

kw.name: Get Text Field Value
kw.doc: Returns the value of a text component (e.g. text field, password field, text area).

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: And La vue connexion de l'utilisateur est fermée
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
La vue connexion de l'utilisateur est fermée (sans délai)
Window Should Not Be Open
kw.doc: Fails if the window is open. | `Window Should Not Be Open` | window |

kw.name: La vue connexion de l'utilisateur est fermée (sans délai)
Window Should Not Be Open
kw.doc: Fails if the window is open. | `Window Should Not Be Open` | window |

kw.arg: La vue connexion de l'utilisateur est fermée (sans délai)
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: And La vue chat de l'utilisateur est affichée
kw.source_name: la vue chat de l'${utilisateur} est affichée

kw.name: Switch To Application
kw.doc: Switches between applications that are known to RemoteSwingLibrary. The application is identified using the ``alias``. Subsequent keywords will be passed on to this application.

kw.name: Window Should Be Open
kw.doc: Fails if the window is not open.

kw.name: Select Window
kw.doc: Selects a window as current context and sets focus to it.

kw.name: Component Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Checks that component is visible. *N.B.* Regular expression can be used to select the dialog by prefixing the identifier with ``regexp=``. See more details in `[#Regular expressions|Regular expressions]` section.

kw.name: Component Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Checks that component is visible. *N.B.* Regular expression can be used to select the dialog by prefixing the identifier with ``regexp=``. See more details in `[#Regular expressions|Regular expressions]` section.

kw.name: Select Window
kw.doc: Selects a window as current context and sets focus to it.

kw.name: Get Text Field Value
kw.doc: Returns the value of a text component (e.g. text field, password field, text area).

kw.name: Should Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is empty.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: And L'utilisateur reçoit un message d'accueil
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Switch To Application
kw.doc: Switches between applications that are known to RemoteSwingLibrary. The application is identified using the ``alias``. Subsequent keywords will be passed on to this application.

kw.name: Select Window
kw.doc: Selects a window as current context and sets focus to it.

kw.name: Get Text Field Value
kw.msg: ${messages} = * Taper /h pour avoir de l'aide sur les commandes du chat.
kw.doc: Returns the value of a text component (e.g. text field, password field, text area).

kw.name: Should End With
kw.doc: Fails if the string ``str1`` does not end with the string ``str2``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: And Tous les ${autres utilisateurs} reçoivent un message d'arrivée du nouvel utilisateur
kw.source_name: tous les ${utilisateurs} reçoivent un message d'arrivée du nouvel utilisateur

kw.name: Run Keywords
Switch To Application
kw.doc: Switches between applications that are known to RemoteSwingLibrary. The application is identified using the ``alias``. Subsequent keywords will be passed on to this application.

kw.name: System Exit
kw.doc: Uses the RemoteSwingLibrary java agent to call system exit for the current java application.

kw.name: plusieurs ${autres utilisateurs} ferment leur client chat
Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Get Process Id
kw.doc: Returns the process ID (pid) of the process as an integer.

kw.name: Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Terminate Process
kw.doc: Stops the process gracefully or forcefully.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Process Should Be Stopped
kw.arg: Le serveur Camix n'est pas arrêté.
kw.doc: Verifies that the process is not running.

kw.arg: plusieurs ${autres utilisateurs} ferment leur client chat
kw.doc: Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

kw.name: Given Le serveur chat est accessible @${IP_DEFAUT}:${PORT_DEFAUT}
Start Process
kw.doc: Starts a new process on background.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Process Should Be Running
kw.arg: Le serveur Camix n'est pas accessible.
kw.doc: Verifies that the process is running.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: TODO: assurer que le serveur Camix est accessible @127.0.0.1:12345
kw.arg: TODO: assurer que le serveur Camix est accessible @${ip}:${port}
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: And Plusieurs ${autres utilisateurs} sont connectés au chat (@${IP_DEFAUT}:${PORT_DEFAUT}, canal par défaut)
kw.source_name: Plusieurs ${utilisateurs} sont connectés au chat (@${ip}:${port}, canal par défaut)

kw.name: Given L'${utilisateur} est connecté au chat (@${ip}:${port}, canal par défaut)

Start Application
kw.doc: Starts the process in the ``command`` parameter on the host operating system. The given ``alias`` is stored to identify the started application in RemoteSwingLibrary.

kw.name: Set Jemmy Timeouts
kw.doc: Sets all relevant jemmy timeouts. By default they are all set to 5 seconds.

kw.name: Switch To Application
kw.doc: Switches between applications that are known to RemoteSwingLibrary. The application is identified using the ``alias``. Subsequent keywords will be passed on to this application.

kw.name: Switch To Application
kw.doc: Switches between applications that are known to RemoteSwingLibrary. The application is identified using the ``alias``. Subsequent keywords will be passed on to this application.

kw.name: Select Window
kw.doc: Selects a window as current context and sets focus to it.

kw.name: Focus To Component
kw.doc: Sets focus to the component. Useful for example when sending keyboard events to a component.

kw.name: Clear Text Field
kw.doc: Clears contents of text component (e.g. text field, password field, text area).

kw.name: Type Into Text Field
kw.doc: Types text into a text component (e.g. text field, password field, text area). Same as `Insert Into Textfield` but sends real key events when setting text field contents. Useful if application expects real keyboard events instead of only setting the text of the textfield.

kw.name: And L'${utilisateur} modifie le numéro du ${port}

kw.doc: Switches between applications that are known to RemoteSwingLibrary. The application is identified using the ``alias``. Subsequent keywords will be passed on to this application.

kw.doc: Selects a window as current context and sets focus to it.

Switch To Application
kw.doc: Switches between applications that are known to RemoteSwingLibrary. The application is identified using the ``alias``. Subsequent keywords will be passed on to this application.

kw.name: Get Text Field Value
kw.msg: ${messages} = * Taper /h pour avoir de l'aide sur les commandes du chat.
kw.doc: Returns the value of a text component (e.g. text field, password field, text area).

kw.name: Should End With
kw.doc: Fails if the string ``str1`` does not end with the string ``str2``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Switch To Application

kw.name: Select Window
kw.doc: Selects a window as current context and sets focus to it.

kw.name: Get Text Field Value
kw.msg:
${messages} = * Taper /h pour avoir de l'aide sur les commandes du chat.
* Un nouvel utilisateur est dans le chat (place publique).
* Un nouvel utilisateur est dans le chat (place publique).
kw.doc: Returns the value of a text component (e.g. text field, password field, text area).

kw.name: Should End With
kw.doc: Fails if the string ``str1`` does not end with the string ``str2``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Run Keywords
Switch To Application
kw.doc: Switches between applications that are known to RemoteSwingLibrary. The application is identified using the ``alias``. Subsequent keywords will be passed on to this application.

kw.name: System Exit
kw.doc: Uses the RemoteSwingLibrary java agent to call system exit for the current java application.

kw.name: plusieurs ${autres utilisateurs} ferment leur client chat
Switch To Application
kw.doc: Switches between applications that are known to RemoteSwingLibrary. The application is identified using the ``alias``. Subsequent keywords will be passed on to this application.

kw.doc: Uses the RemoteSwingLibrary java agent to call system exit for the current java application.

kw.name: Switch To Application
kw.doc: Switches between applications that are known to RemoteSwingLibrary. The application is identified using the ``alias``. Subsequent keywords will be passed on to this application.

kw.name: System Exit
kw.doc: Uses the RemoteSwingLibrary java agent to call system exit for the current java application.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Get Process Id
kw.doc: Returns the process ID (pid) of the process as an integer.

kw.name: Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Terminate Process
kw.doc: Stops the process gracefully or forcefully.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Process Should Be Stopped
kw.arg: Le serveur Camix n'est pas arrêté.
kw.doc: Verifies that the process is not running.

kw.arg: plusieurs ${autres utilisateurs} ferment leur client chat
kw.doc: Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

test.name: AC - Se connecter au chat - IP/port défaut

kw.name: Se connecter au chat - IP/port défaut
Given Le serveur chat est accessible @${IP_DEFAUT}:${PORT_DEFAUT}
Start Process
kw.doc: Starts a new process on background.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Process Should Be Running
kw.arg: Le serveur Camix n'est pas accessible.
kw.doc: Verifies that the process is running.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: TODO: assurer que le serveur Camix est accessible @127.0.0.1:12345
kw.arg: TODO: assurer que le serveur Camix est accessible @${ip}:${port}
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: And Plusieurs ${autres utilisateurs} sont connectés au chat (@${IP_DEFAUT}:${PORT_DEFAUT}, canal par défaut)
kw.source_name: Plusieurs ${utilisateurs} sont connectés au chat (@${ip}:${port}, canal par défaut)

kw.name: Given L'${utilisateur} est connecté au chat (@${ip}:${port}, canal par défaut)
kw.source_name: L'${utilisateur} est connecté au chat (@${ip}:${port}, canal par défaut)

kw.name: And L'utilisateur lance le client chat
Start Application
kw.doc: Starts the process in the ``command`` parameter on the host operating system. The given ``alias`` is stored to identify the started application in RemoteSwingLibrary.

kw.name: Set Jemmy Timeouts
kw.doc: Sets all relevant jemmy timeouts. By default they are all set to 5 seconds.

kw.name: Switch To Application
kw.doc: Switches between applications that are known to RemoteSwingLibrary. The application is identified using the ``alias``. Subsequent keywords will be passed on to this application.

kw.name: When l'utilisateur demande à se connecter
Switch To Application
kw.doc: Switches between applications that are known to RemoteSwingLibrary. The application is identified using the ``alias``. Subsequent keywords will be passed on to this application.

kw.name: Select Window
kw.doc: Selects a window as current context and sets focus to it.

kw.name: Click On Component
kw.doc: Clicks on a component, optionally using click count, a specific mouse button and keyboard modifiers.

kw.name: Then Un message informe l'utilisateur qu'une connexion est initiée à l'adresse ${IP_DEFAUT} et au ${PORT_DEFAUT} mentionnés
kw.source_name: Un message informe l'${utilisateur} qu'une connexion est initiée à l'adresse ${ip} et au ${port} mentionnés

kw.name: Convert To Integer
kw.doc: Converts the given item to an integer number.

kw.name: Format String
kw.doc: Formats a ``template`` using the given ``positional`` and ``named`` arguments.

kw.name: Switch To Application
kw.doc: Switches between applications that are known to RemoteSwingLibrary. The application is identified using the ``alias``. Subsequent keywords will be passed on to this application.

kw.name: Select Window
kw.doc: Selects a window as current context and sets focus to it.

kw.name: Get Text Field Value
kw.doc: Returns the value of a text component (e.g. text field, password field, text area).

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: And La vue connexion de l'utilisateur est fermée
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
La vue connexion de l'utilisateur est fermée (sans délai)
Window Should Not Be Open
kw.doc: Fails if the window is open. | `Window Should Not Be Open` | window |

kw.name: La vue connexion de l'utilisateur est fermée (sans délai)
Window Should Not Be Open
kw.doc: Fails if the window is open. | `Window Should Not Be Open` | window |

kw.arg: La vue connexion de l'utilisateur est fermée (sans délai)
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: And La vue chat de l'utilisateur est affichée
kw.source_name: la vue chat de l'${utilisateur} est affichée

kw.name: Switch To Application
kw.doc: Switches between applications that are known to RemoteSwingLibrary. The application is identified using the ``alias``. Subsequent keywords will be passed on to this application.

kw.name: Window Should Be Open
kw.doc: Fails if the window is not open.

kw.name: Select Window
kw.doc: Selects a window as current context and sets focus to it.

kw.name: Component Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Checks that component is visible. *N.B.* Regular expression can be used to select the dialog by prefixing the identifier with ``regexp=``. See more details in `[#Regular expressions|Regular expressions]` section.

kw.name: Component Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Checks that component is visible. *N.B.* Regular expression can be used to select the dialog by prefixing the identifier with ``regexp=``. See more details in `[#Regular expressions|Regular expressions]` section.

kw.name: Select Window
kw.doc: Selects a window as current context and sets focus to it.

kw.name: Get Text Field Value
kw.doc: Returns the value of a text component (e.g. text field, password field, text area).

kw.name: Should Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is empty.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: And L'utilisateur reçoit un message d'accueil
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Switch To Application
kw.doc: Switches between applications that are known to RemoteSwingLibrary. The application is identified using the ``alias``. Subsequent keywords will be passed on to this application.

kw.name: Select Window
kw.doc: Selects a window as current context and sets focus to it.

kw.name: Get Text Field Value
kw.msg: ${messages} = * Taper /h pour avoir de l'aide sur les commandes du chat.
kw.doc: Returns the value of a text component (e.g. text field, password field, text area).

kw.name: Should End With
kw.doc: Fails if the string ``str1`` does not end with the string ``str2``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: And Tous les ${autres utilisateurs} reçoivent un message d'arrivée du nouvel utilisateur
kw.source_name: tous les ${utilisateurs} reçoivent un message d'arrivée du nouvel utilisateur

kw.name: Run Keywords
Switch To Application
kw.doc: Switches between applications that are known to RemoteSwingLibrary. The application is identified using the ``alias``. Subsequent keywords will be passed on to this application.

kw.name: System Exit
kw.doc: Uses the RemoteSwingLibrary java agent to call system exit for the current java application.

Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Get Process Id
kw.doc: Returns the process ID (pid) of the process as an integer.

kw.name: Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Terminate Process
kw.doc: Stops the process gracefully or forcefully.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Process Should Be Stopped
kw.arg: Le serveur Camix n'est pas arrêté.
kw.doc: Verifies that the process is not running.

kw.arg: plusieurs ${autres utilisateurs} ferment leur client chat

Start Process
kw.doc: Starts a new process on background.

kw.name: And Plusieurs ${autres utilisateurs} sont connectés au chat (@${IP_DEFAUT}:${PORT_DEFAUT}, canal par défaut)
kw.source_name: Plusieurs ${utilisateurs} sont connectés au chat (@${ip}:${port}, canal par défaut)

kw.name: Given L'${utilisateur} est connecté au chat (@${ip}:${port}, canal par défaut)
kw.source_name: L'${utilisateur} est connecté au chat (@${ip}:${port}, canal par défaut)

kw.name: Given L'${utilisateur} lance le client chat
Start Application
kw.doc: Starts the process in the ``command`` parameter on the host operating system. The given ``alias`` is stored to identify the started application in RemoteSwingLibrary.

kw.name: Set Jemmy Timeouts
kw.doc: Sets all relevant jemmy timeouts. By default they are all set to 5 seconds.

kw.name: Switch To Application
kw.doc: Switches between applications that are known to RemoteSwingLibrary. The application is identified using the ``alias``. Subsequent keywords will be passed on to this application.

kw.name: Switch To Application
kw.doc: Switches between applications that are known to RemoteSwingLibrary. The application is identified using the ``alias``. Subsequent keywords will be passed on to this application.

kw.name: Select Window
kw.doc: Selects a window as current context and sets focus to it.

kw.name: Focus To Component
kw.doc: Sets focus to the component. Useful for example when sending keyboard events to a component.

kw.name: Clear Text Field
kw.doc: Clears contents of text component (e.g. text field, password field, text area).

kw.name: Type Into Text Field
kw.doc: Types text into a text component (e.g. text field, password field, text area). Same as `Insert Into Textfield` but sends real key events when setting text field contents. Useful if application expects real keyboard events instead of only setting the text of the textfield.

kw.name: And L'${utilisateur} modifie le numéro du ${port}

kw.doc: Switches between applications that are known to RemoteSwingLibrary. The application is identified using the ``alias``. Subsequent keywords will be passed on to this application.

kw.doc: Selects a window as current context and sets focus to it.

kw.doc: Sets focus to the component. Useful for example when sending keyboard events to a component.

kw.doc: Clears contents of text component (e.g. text field, password field, text area).

kw.name: Type Into Text Field
kw.doc: Types text into a text component (e.g. text field, password field, text area). Same as `Insert Into Textfield` but sends real key events when setting text field contents. Useful if application expects real keyboard events instead of only setting the text of the textfield.

kw.doc: Selects a window as current context and sets focus to it.

kw.name: Get Text Field Value
kw.doc: Returns the value of a text component (e.g. text field, password field, text area).

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: And Après le délai de connexion, un message informe l'utilisateur que la connexion est impossible à l'adresse ${IP_DEFAUT} et au ${PORT_DEFAUT} mentionnés
kw.source_name: Après le délai de connexion, un message informe l'${utilisateur} que la connexion est impossible à l'adresse ${ip} et au ${port} mentionnés

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Convert To Integer
kw.doc: Converts the given item to an integer number.

kw.name: Format String
kw.doc: Formats a ``template`` using the given ``positional`` and ``named`` arguments.

kw.name: Switch To Application
kw.doc: Switches between applications that are known to RemoteSwingLibrary. The application is identified using the ``alias``. Subsequent keywords will be passed on to this application.

kw.name: Select Window
kw.doc: Selects a window as current context and sets focus to it.

kw.name: Get Text Field Value
kw.doc: Returns the value of a text component (e.g. text field, password field, text area).

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Switch To Application
kw.doc: Switches between applications that are known to RemoteSwingLibrary. The application is identified using the ``alias``. Subsequent keywords will be passed on to this application.

kw.name: System Exit
kw.doc: Uses the RemoteSwingLibrary java agent to call system exit for the current java application.

suite.doc:
User Story : Se connecter au chat
[En tant qu'] utilisateur du chat [Je dois pouvoir] saisir une adresse IP et un numéro de port [Et] me connecter au chat [Afin d'] entrer dans le chat à l'adresse IP et au port mentionnés
Business Rules : Le délai de connexion est de 3 secondes (configuration).
